title: EUR 5s30s Steepener with Convexity Overlay
rationale: Long-end term premium asymmetry and richer front-intermediate valuations support a medium-horizon steepening profile.
catalysts: ECB communication drift, supply dynamics, and repricing of terminal rate assumptions.
invalidation: Growth shock with flight-to-duration and persistent front-end repricing lower.

title: GBP Real Yield Receiver as Liability Hedge Extension
rationale: Hedge extension improves downside resilience under weaker growth while preserving portfolio capital efficiency.
catalysts: Slower inflation prints and lower policy uncertainty premium in long-end rates.
invalidation: Sticky inflation with renewed long-end real-yield bear steepening.

title: UST 10Y vs Gilt RV Switch
rationale: Valuation and carry-adjusted spread differential remains stretched versus policy-path expectations.
catalysts: Cross-market term premium convergence and issuance composition shifts.
invalidation: US growth upside surprises with persistent US-end underperformance.

title: Pending Idea Awaiting Approval
rationale: Pending moderation entry used to support the approval-to-live workflow.
invalidation: Spread widening from macro risk-off and defaults repricing.
